issue_summary: Use FileUtils.openOutputStream, thus creating parent directories if required
javadoc_before:
/** * Copies bytes from the URL source to a file * destination. The directories up to destination * will be created if they don't already exist. destination * will be overwritten if it already exists. * * @param source A URL to copy bytes from. * @param destination A non-directory File to write bytes to * (possibly overwriting). * * @throws IOException if *
    *
  • source URL cannot be opened
    • *
  • destination cannot be written to
    • *
  • an IO error occurs during copying
    • *
*/
javadoc_after: /** * Copies bytes from the URL source to a file * destination. The directories up to destination * will be created if they don't already exist. destination * will be overwritten if it already exists. * * @param source the URL to copy bytes from, not null * @param destination the non-directory File to write bytes to * (possibly overwriting), not null * @throws IOException if source URL cannot be opened * @throws IOException if destination is a directory * @throws IOException if destination cannot be written * @throws IOException if destination needs creating but can't be * @throws IOException if an IO error occurs during copying */
